title: '8th Loop for the Win!' Manga Artist Riku Natsume Launches New Series
content: The official X (formerly Twitter ) account for LEED Publishing 's Comic Border platform announced on Friday that 8th Loop for the Win! manga artist Riku Natsume will launch a new manga series titled Saimu Mahō Shōjo Kureca Riboca ( Debt Magical Girl Kureca Riboca ) on the platform on May 22.
author: ANN

title: Bleach Reveals First Look at New Spinoff Ahead of Anime’s Finale
content: Bleach is getting ready to make its comeback in just a few more months with the final season of the anime franchise , but it’s coming back with a new spinoff release shortly before.
author: ComicBook

title: Koji Yamamura's 'Haru no Umi,' More Japanese Short Films Compete at 2026 Annecy
content: • Short Films Official: Kōji Yamamura's "Haru no Umi" ("The Spring Sea") • Perspectives: Yakata Kanata's "Bucketman" and Ryotaro Miyajima's "Rest" • Midnight Shorts: Seishirō Nagaya's "A Couple Clucking Chickens Were Still Kickin' in the Schoolyard" from Tatsuki Fujimoto 17-26 and Ryoji Yamada's Builder • Graduation…
author: ANN

title: After 4 Years, Underrated Crunchyroll Isekai Reveals New Look for Season 2 Return
content: Four years after the first season came to an end, a major Isekai now streaming with Crunchyroll has dropped the first look trailer for its Season 2 comeback teasing a big facelift.
author: ComicBook

title: Sacrificial Princess & the King of Beasts' Yu Tomofuji Launches New Series in July
content: The June 1 issue of Hakusensha 's The Hana to Yume magazine announced on Monday that Yu Tomofuji will launch a new manga titled Kimi o Norowaba (If I Curse You) in the magazine's next issue on July 27.
author: ANN

title: 30 Years Ago Today, Cartoon Network Debuted Its First Major Hit (& Its Creator Will Never Revive It)
content: 30 years ago today, Cartoon Network debuted one of its first real original hits, but unfortunately the original creator behind it all has no interest in ever bringing it back for more despite its iconic status. Cartoon Network started out as a much different channel than it is now.
author: ComicBook

title: My Stepmother and Stepsisters Aren't Wicked Reveals July Premiere in New Trailer
content: The previously announced anime adaptation of My Stepmother and Stepsisters Aren’t Wicked manga has revealed a July 2026 premiere in the latest trailer. A new visual was also released and Anna Mugiho joins the cast as Gungnir.
author: Anime Corner

title: Akane Torikai's Bad Babies Don't Cry Manga Enters Final Arc
content: This year's 21st issue of Kodansha 's Morning magazine revealed on April 23 that Akane Torikai 's Bad Babies Don't Cry ( Bad Baby wa Nakanai ) manga is entering its final arc in the magazine's next issue on April 30.
author: ANN

title: Black Clover Manga Reaches Climax
content: Shueisha 's "Jump Press" livestream revealed on Monday that Yūki Tabata 's Black Clover manga is reaching its climax. There will be three chapters in Jump Giga 's spring issue on May 1.
author: ANN

title: Kagurabachi Creator Breaks Silence on New Anime With Big Naruto Shout Out
content: Kagurabachi has officially announced it’s finally getting its own anime next year , and the creator behind it all gave Naruto a surprise shout out to help celebrate. Kagurabachi first made its debut with Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine back in 2023, and fans have been asking for it to get its own anime even…
author: ComicBook
